column14: KPI Title is your IRIS KPI Title for displaying to user.
Type is your type of KPI - narrative, tabular qualitative, tabular quantitative, table header. For that please follow the codes attached in the document.
Topic ID is which topic the KPI belongs to. For that please follow the codes attached in "Code" sheet of attached Excel.
Aggregation Logic defines the aggregation formula for the particular KPI. For that please follow the codes attached in "Code" sheet of attached Excel.
Row Index specifies the row index for the KPI. Start the count from the cell where data is being entered - not the row/column headers.
Column Index specifies the column index for the KPI. Start the count from the cell where data is being entered - not the row/column headers.

column8: Resource use, circular economy & Waste management
column14: Row Header defines the row header for the particular KPI of a table.
Column Header defines the column header for the particular KPI of a table.
Cell Formula defines any cell formula applicable.
KPI Detail provides standard codes and standard-specific descriptions in JSON format. Please check the provided Excel for that.
Category provides E, S, G, GD categories. For that please follow the codes attached in "Code" sheet of attached Excel.
For KPIs with frequency (like CY, PY, N+1, N+2..so on) please repeat the KPIs, specify the frequency, and change the column order.
For dynamic KPIs, just mention the broken down KPI titles, and change the column orders. The row order will remain 0.
